pr.title: Knowledge graph auto-ingest: capability-graph-ingest — evidence feeds the graph without manual create (C10)
pr.description:
## Summary

Closes the "graph feeding is manual" gap: evidence that already exists on disk now flows into the capability knowledge graph with one command — no hand-built `capability-graph-create` payloads.

New `GraphAutoIngestEngine` (`src/axiom_core/graph_auto_ingest.py`) scans four read-only artifact sources and assembles one graph report via the existing `CapabilityKnowledgeGraphEngine` (framework untouched):

- `capability_evidence_intake/*/report.json` → `VALIDATION` node + `VALIDATES` edge to a shared `CAPABILITY` node
- `execution_chain/*/evidence.json` → `ARTIFACT` node + `HAS_ARTIFACT` edge from the capability
- `validation_evidence/*/validation_run.json` → `VALIDATION` node (run status + command counts)
- `github_metadata_import/*/report.json` → `EVENT` node per PR, carrying `repository_pr_number` + `global_capability_number` (consumes the #68 backfill, so the reconciled PR timeline lands in the graph)

Design properties:
- **Deterministic**: node/edge ids derived from source ids (`ingest:<type>:<source_id>`), so re-runs over the same artifacts yield identical graph structure (only the report_id differs) — verified by test.
- **Safe**: read-only artifact scan, upstream files never mutated (tested); malformed artifact files recorded as `skipped`, never fatal; missing source dirs → empty graph, not an error.
- Shared capability nodes dedupe via the graph framework's existing `(node_type, source_id)` dedup.

New CLI `axiom capability-graph-ingest [--artifacts-root <dir>] [--json-output]`, cataloged in the command registry (READ_ONLY / SAFE) and `EXPECTED_AXIOM_COMMANDS`.

Real-data run on this repo's artifacts: 3 evidence intakes + 3 chain runs + 2 validation runs + 67 PR imports → 76 nodes / 6 edges, 0 skipped.

**Stacked on #68** (base is the backfill branch — the PR-import ingest consumes its imports and the skill/registry edits are adjacent); merge #68 first and GitHub retargets this to main.

What did NOT change: `CapabilityKnowledgeGraphEngine` semantics, schemas, any upstream evidence producer.

Tests (tier 2, targeted): `tests/test_graph_auto_ingest.py` 10 passed (all-sources ingest, dedup, re-run determinism, malformed skip, no-mutation, canonical-number carry-through), `tests/test_command_registry.py` 27 passed; ruff clean. Skill `testing-cli-governance` updated in the same PR.

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/8ad1c9ac0d2f4252bb77647f1eabaac7
Requested by: @plamen-dev
pr.author: plamen-dev
